item.title: Tip Sheet Number 15 — July 24, 2026
item.description: Bi-weekly information on upcoming and recently released multimedia, publications, data, products, and reports.

item.title: New Data Tables Released From Household Trends and Outlook Pulse Survey
item.description: New data tables released about employment, social connectedness, and other topics from the experimental HTOPS.

item.title: The Census Bureau Higher Education Consortium: Transforming Collaboration Between the U.S. Census Bureau and Higher Education
item.description: The CBHEC is a collaborative effort by the Census Bureau and academia to develop innovators to meet the nation’s statistical needs.

item.title: Census Bureau Statement on Supplemental Poverty Measure
item.description: The U.S. Census Bureau today announced plans to re-release estimates for the Supplemental Poverty Measure (SPM) from 2019 to 2024.

item.title: Press Release | For over a decade, the SDGs have delivered results – now the world must urgently scale up what works, UN report finds - United Nations Sustainable Development
item.description: United Nations Sustainable Development Goals - Time for Global Action for People and Planet

item.title: The Fourth of July: 2026
item.description: On this day in 1776, the Continental Congress approved the Declaration of Independence, setting the 13 colonies on the road to freedom as a sovereign nation.

item.title: Remembering Kenneth Prewitt
item.description: I am sad to share news of the passing of Kenneth Prewitt, former director of the U.S. Census Bureau, at age 90.

item.title: Census Takers to Start Visiting Households for 2026 Census Test
item.description: Census Takers Visiting Households in Huntsville, Alabama, and Spartanburg, South Carolina for the 2026 Census Test.

item.title: 2020 Census
item.description: The 2020 Census marked the 24th count of the U.S. population and the first time that households were invited to respond to the census online.

item.title: 2026 Census Test
item.description: The 2026 Census Test is the U.S. Census Bureau's first opportunity to try out new tools and methods in select locations around the United States.

item.title: 2030 Census
item.description: Planning is currently underway for the 2030 Census, the 25th population count in U.S. history.

item.title: Undesa Pd 2026 Pb187.Pdf
item.description: Undesa Pd 2026 Pb187.Pdf

item.title: Undesa Pd 2025 Technical Paper Tp Cohortfert.Pdf
item.description: Undesa Pd 2025 Technical Paper Tp Cohortfert.Pdf

item.title: UN Task Force on Leveraging Partnerships towards the Implementation of the 2030 Agenda | United Nations
item.description: UN Task Force on Leveraging Partnerships towards the Implementation of the 2030 Agenda | United Nations
